title: agrostis infirma var. formosana
intro: Agrostis infirma var. formosana, also known as Taiwan bentgrass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae) and is native to Taiwan. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis infirma var. formosana include reducing fever, alleviating cough, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
